title: Windows/Linux compatibility
description: CLI uses macOS Keychain and path separators. Add cross-platform support.

context.text: Platform abstraction: isMacOS/isLinux/isWindows helpers, credential store abstraction with Keychain/libsecret/file fallback. 89-line platform.ts.

acceptanceCriteria: Credential store abstraction (Keychain on macOS, keytar on Linux/Windows)
